label: Pawn kind
description: Defines a kind of pawn - the generation template controlling race, graphics, gear, backstory filters, traits, xenotype, skills, combat stats, and AI behaviour for a pawn of this type.

race.label: Race
race.description: ThingDef that defines the race this pawn kind belongs to. Determines body, health, locomotion, and race-level stats.

defaultFactionDef.label: Default faction
defaultFactionDef.description: FactionDef this pawn kind belongs to when no explicit faction is specified during spawning.

backstoryFilters.label: Backstory filters
backstoryFilters.description: Filters that control which backstory categories are eligible when generating this pawn kind.

backstoryFiltersOverride.label: Backstory filters override
backstoryFiltersOverride.description: Completely replaces inherited backstoryFilters. Only the entries in this list are used when set.

backstoryCategories.label: Backstory categories
backstoryCategories.description: Legacy list of backstory category strings. Folded into backstoryFilters during PostLoad. Kept for XML compatibility.

labelPlural.label: Label (plural)
labelPlural.description: Plural form of the pawn kind label used in UI contexts that refer to multiple pawns of this kind.

lifeStages.label: Life stages
lifeStages.description: Per-life-stage graphic and label overrides. The index must match the corresponding life stage in the race's RaceProperties.

alternateGraphics.label: Alternate graphics
alternateGraphics.description: Weighted list of alternate graphic variants. One is selected randomly at spawn according to the alternateGraphicChance.

forcedTraits.label: Forced traits
forcedTraits.description: Traits always given to pawns of this kind. Each entry is a TraitDef and optional degree.

disallowedTraitsWithDegree.label: Disallowed traits with degree
disallowedTraitsWithDegree.description: Trait-and-degree pairs blocked from random assignment. Child element names are TraitDef defNames; text is the integer degree.

disallowedTraits.label: Disallowed traits
disallowedTraits.description: TraitDefs that cannot be randomly assigned to pawns of this kind regardless of degree.

alternateGraphicChance.label: Alternate graphic chance
alternateGraphicChance.description: Probability (0–1) that an alternate graphic is chosen from alternateGraphics at spawn. When 0 only the life-stage body graphic is used.

mutant.label: Mutant
mutant.description: MutantDef applied to pawns of this kind at spawn.

xenotypeSet.label: Xenotype set
xenotypeSet.description: Weighted xenotype distribution used when generating this pawn kind. Overrides faction xenotypes when useFactionXenotypes is false.

useFactionXenotypes.label: Use faction xenotypes
useFactionXenotypes.description: If true, the pawn inherits xenotype distribution from its faction instead of xenotypeSet.

styleItemTags.label: Style item tags
styleItemTags.description: Weighted style and hair tags controlling which hairstyles and style items are selected during generation.

forcedHair.label: Forced hair
forcedHair.description: HairDef that overrides random hair selection for all pawns of this kind.

forcedHairColor.label: Forced hair color
forcedHairColor.description: Color override applied to pawn hair at generation. Format: (r, g, b, a).

missingParts.label: Missing parts
missingParts.description: Body parts that may be absent at spawn. Each entry specifies the part, the hediff representing the wound, and the probability.

nameMaker.label: Name maker
nameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate names for pawns of this kind.

nameMakerFemale.label: Name maker (female)
nameMakerFemale.description: RulePackDef used to generate names for female pawns of this kind. Falls back to nameMaker when absent.

abilities.label: Abilities
abilities.description: AbilityDefs granted to all pawns of this kind at generation.

preventIdeo.label: Prevent ideo
preventIdeo.description: If true, pawns of this kind are not assigned an ideology during generation.

studiableAsPrisoner.label: Studiable as prisoner
studiableAsPrisoner.description: If true, this pawn kind can be studied by researchers while held as a prisoner.

isBoss.label: Is boss
isBoss.description: If true, this pawn is treated as a boss unit with special raid scaling rules.

moveSpeedFactorByTerrainTag.label: Move speed factor by terrain tag
moveSpeedFactorByTerrainTag.description: Per-terrain-tag move speed multipliers. Child element names are terrain tag strings; text is the float factor.

fixedChildBackstories.label: Fixed child backstories
fixedChildBackstories.description: Pool of BackstoryDefs restricted to the childhood slot for this pawn kind. One is chosen randomly at generation.

fixedAdultBackstories.label: Fixed adult backstories
fixedAdultBackstories.description: Pool of BackstoryDefs restricted to the adulthood slot for this pawn kind. One is chosen randomly at generation.

backstoryCryptosleepCommonality.label: Backstory cryptosleep commonality
backstoryCryptosleepCommonality.description: Relative weight for selecting cryptosleep-origin backstories for this pawn kind. Higher values increase the probability of cryptosleep backstories.

chronologicalAgeRange.label: Chronological age range
chronologicalAgeRange.description: Float range for the pawn's total chronological age in years, including time spent in cryptosleep. When absent the biological age range is used.

minGenerationAge.label: Min generation age
minGenerationAge.description: Minimum biological age in years when generating this pawn kind.

maxGenerationAge.label: Max generation age
maxGenerationAge.description: Maximum biological age in years when generating this pawn kind.

factionLeader.label: Faction leader
factionLeader.description: If true, this pawn kind can be chosen as the leader of its faction.

fixedGender.label: Fixed gender
fixedGender.description: Forces all generated pawns of this kind to have the specified gender. None means gender is chosen randomly.

allowOldAgeInjuries.label: Allow old age injuries
allowOldAgeInjuries.description: If true, old-age injuries such as cataracts and bad back may be applied during generation.

generateInitialNonFamilyRelations.label: Generate initial non-family relations
generateInitialNonFamilyRelations.description: If true, random non-family social relationships are generated between pawns of this kind at game start.

pawnGroupDevelopmentStage.label: Pawn group developmental stage
pawnGroupDevelopmentStage.description: DevelopmentalStage flags (comma-separated) controlling which life stages are eligible when selecting this pawn kind for a group. Defaults to Adult.

destroyGearOnDrop.label: Destroy gear on drop
destroyGearOnDrop.description: If true, gear is destroyed rather than dropped when the pawn dies or is stripped.

canStrip.label: Can strip
canStrip.description: If true, colonists can strip gear from downed or dead pawns of this kind.

defendPointRadius.label: Defend point radius
defendPointRadius.description: Radius in cells around a defend point within which this pawn kind will hold position. -1 uses the default radius.

factionHostileOnKill.label: Faction hostile on kill
factionHostileOnKill.description: If true, killing a pawn of this kind makes the pawn's faction hostile to the player.

factionHostileOnDeath.label: Faction hostile on death
factionHostileOnDeath.description: If true, any death of a pawn of this kind - not just player-inflicted - makes the faction hostile.

hostileToAll.label: Hostile to all
hostileToAll.description: If true, pawns of this kind are hostile to every other faction including allies.

initialResistanceRange.label: Initial resistance range
initialResistanceRange.description: Float range for starting resistance when captured as a prisoner. When absent the default resistance formula applies.

initialWillRange.label: Initial will range
initialWillRange.description: Float range for starting will when captured as a prisoner under the Ideology system.

forceNoDeathNotification.label: Force no death notification
forceNoDeathNotification.description: If true, no death letter or notification is generated when a pawn of this kind dies.

skipResistant.label: Skip resistant
skipResistant.description: If true, captured pawns of this kind skip the resistance phase and go directly to the will phase.

controlGroupPortraitZoom.label: Control group portrait zoom
controlGroupPortraitZoom.description: Zoom factor for this pawn's portrait in the control group UI. Default 1 means no scaling.

overrideDeathOnDownedChance.label: Override death on downed chance
overrideDeathOnDownedChance.description: Overrides the probability that a downed pawn of this kind dies from the downed event. Omit to use the game's default death-on-downed curve.

forceDeathOnDowned.label: Force death on downed
forceDeathOnDowned.description: If true, pawns of this kind always die when downed rather than becoming incapacitated.

immuneToGameConditionEffects.label: Immune to game condition effects
immuneToGameConditionEffects.description: If true, this pawn kind ignores map-wide game condition effects such as temperature extremes.

immuneToTraps.label: Immune to traps
immuneToTraps.description: If true, pawns of this kind never trigger traps.

collidesWithPawns.label: Collides with pawns
collidesWithPawns.description: If true, this pawn uses pawn-collision physics and blocks passage by other pawns.

ignoresPainShock.label: Ignores pain shock
ignoresPainShock.description: If true, this pawn never goes into pain shock regardless of pain level.

canMeleeAttack.label: Can melee attack
canMeleeAttack.description: If true, this pawn can engage enemies in melee combat.

basePrisonBreakMtbDays.label: Base prison break MTB (days)
basePrisonBreakMtbDays.description: Mean time between prison break attempts in days. Modifiers apply on top of this base value.

useFixedRotation.label: Use fixed rotation
useFixedRotation.description: If true, this pawn always faces the direction specified by fixedRotation.

fixedRotation.label: Fixed rotation
fixedRotation.description: Cardinal direction this pawn always faces when useFixedRotation is true.

showInDebugSpawner.label: Show in debug spawner
showInDebugSpawner.description: If true, this pawn kind appears in the debug pawn spawner tool.

canOpenAnyDoor.label: Can open any door
canOpenAnyDoor.description: If true, this pawn can open doors regardless of faction ownership or access rights.

canOpenDoors.label: Can open doors
canOpenDoors.description: If true, this pawn can open doors it has access to. When false the pawn treats all doors as impassable.

overrideDebugActionCategory.label: Override debug action category
overrideDebugActionCategory.description: Category string shown in the debug action menu for pawns of this kind. Overrides the default category derived from the race.

royalTitleChance.label: Royal title chance
royalTitleChance.description: Probability (0–1) that a generated pawn of this kind is assigned a random royal title. Requires Royalty.

titleRequired.label: Title required
titleRequired.description: Minimum RoyalTitleDef a pawn must hold to be generated as this kind. Requires Royalty.

minTitleRequired.label: Min title required
minTitleRequired.description: Minimum RoyalTitleDef in the title ladder that qualifies a pawn to be generated as this kind.

titleSelectOne.label: Title select one
titleSelectOne.description: Pool of RoyalTitleDefs from which one is chosen for this pawn kind. Requires Royalty.

allowRoyalRoomRequirements.label: Allow royal room requirements
allowRoyalRoomRequirements.description: If true, royal title room requirements apply to this pawn kind.

allowRoyalApparelRequirements.label: Allow royal apparel requirements
allowRoyalApparelRequirements.description: If true, royal title apparel requirements apply to this pawn kind.

meleeAttackInfectionPathways.label: Melee attack infection pathways
meleeAttackInfectionPathways.description: InfectionPathwayDefs transmitted when this pawn strikes enemies in melee.

rangedAttackInfectionPathways.label: Ranged attack infection pathways
rangedAttackInfectionPathways.description: InfectionPathwayDefs transmitted when this pawn hits enemies with a ranged attack.

isFighter.label: Is fighter
isFighter.description: If true, this pawn participates in combat. If false, it flees rather than fighting.

combatPower.label: Combat power
combatPower.description: Raid point cost of this pawn kind. -1 causes the game to calculate power from race and gear stats.

canArriveManhunter.label: Can arrive manhunter
canArriveManhunter.description: If true, this pawn kind can appear in manhunter pack events.

canBeSapper.label: Can be sapper
canBeSapper.description: If true, this pawn can take the sapper role in raids, prioritising structure destruction.

isGoodBreacher.label: Is good breacher
isGoodBreacher.description: If true, this pawn is considered an effective breacher for raid group composition.

allowInMechClusters.label: Allow in mech clusters
allowInMechClusters.description: If true, this pawn kind can appear in mechanoid cluster threats.

maxPerGroup.label: Max per group
maxPerGroup.description: Maximum number of this pawn kind that can appear in a single raid group. Selection is rejected when the current count reaches this value, so 0 effectively blocks the kind. Omit or use 2147483647 for no limit.

isGoodPsychicRitualInvoker.label: Is good psychic ritual invoker
isGoodPsychicRitualInvoker.description: If true, this pawn kind is preferred as the invoker in psychic ritual compositions.

canBeScattered.label: Can be scattered
canBeScattered.description: If true, this pawn kind can be included in world-map scatter groups.

appearsRandomlyInCombatGroups.label: Appears randomly in combat groups
appearsRandomlyInCombatGroups.description: If true, this pawn kind may appear in randomly composed combat groups during raids.

aiAvoidCover.label: AI avoid cover
aiAvoidCover.description: If true, the pawn AI avoids taking cover positions during combat.

fleeHealthThresholdRange.label: Flee health threshold range
fleeHealthThresholdRange.description: Float range for the health fraction at which this pawn flees combat. Negative values are sampled symmetrically around 0.

acceptArrestChanceFactor.label: Accept arrest chance factor
acceptArrestChanceFactor.description: Multiplier on the base probability that this pawn accepts an arrest attempt without resisting.

canUseAvoidGrid.label: Can use avoid grid
canUseAvoidGrid.description: If true, the pawn AI uses the avoid grid when pathfinding away from threats.

itemQuality.label: Item quality
itemQuality.description: Default quality category for gear generated for this pawn kind.

forceWeaponQuality.label: Force weapon quality
forceWeaponQuality.description: Forces generated weapons to this quality category, overriding itemQuality for weapons.

forceNormalGearQuality.label: Force normal gear quality
forceNormalGearQuality.description: If true, all generated gear is forced to Normal quality regardless of itemQuality.

gearHealthRange.label: Gear health range
gearHealthRange.description: Float range for the health fraction of generated gear. 1~1 means full health.

weaponMoney.label: Weapon money
weaponMoney.description: Silver value range used to select a weapon. The most expensive weapon within the range is chosen.

weaponTags.label: Weapon tags
weaponTags.description: Weapon tags eligible for this pawn kind. Only weapons with at least one matching tag are considered.

weaponStuffOverride.label: Weapon stuff override
weaponStuffOverride.description: ThingDef material used as the stuff for generated weapons, overriding random stuff selection.

weaponStyleDef.label: Weapon style def
weaponStyleDef.description: ThingStyleDef applied to the generated weapon.

apparelMoney.label: Apparel money
apparelMoney.description: Silver value range used to select apparel items for this pawn kind.

apparelRequired.label: Apparel required
apparelRequired.description: ThingDefs always worn by pawns of this kind regardless of other apparel selection.

apparelTags.label: Apparel tags
apparelTags.description: Apparel tags eligible for this pawn kind. Only apparel with at least one matching tag is considered.

apparelDisallowTags.label: Apparel disallow tags
apparelDisallowTags.description: Apparel tags that prevent an apparel item from being selected for this pawn kind.

apparelAllowHeadgearChance.label: Apparel allow headgear chance
apparelAllowHeadgearChance.description: Probability (0–1) that headgear is included when generating apparel for this pawn kind.

ignoreApparelAllowChance.label: Ignore apparel allow chance
ignoreApparelAllowChance.description: If true, apparelAllowHeadgearChance is ignored and headgear is always allowed.

apparelIgnoreSeasons.label: Apparel ignore seasons
apparelIgnoreSeasons.description: If true, apparel is selected regardless of seasonal temperature suitability.

apparelIgnorePollution.label: Apparel ignore pollution
apparelIgnorePollution.description: If true, apparel selection ignores pollution resistance ratings.

ignoreFactionApparelStuffRequirements.label: Ignore faction apparel stuff requirements
ignoreFactionApparelStuffRequirements.description: If true, faction-level material restrictions on apparel are ignored during generation.

apparelColor.label: Apparel color
apparelColor.description: Color tint applied to generated apparel. Format: (r, g, b, a) or a named color such as white.

skinColorOverride.label: Skin color override
skinColorOverride.description: Color replacing the pawn's skin color at generation. Format: (r, g, b, a).

favoriteColor.label: Favorite color
favoriteColor.description: ColorDef assigned as the pawn's favourite color, affecting ideology-based apparel and decoration preferences.

ignoreIdeoApparelColors.label: Ignore ideo apparel colors
ignoreIdeoApparelColors.description: If true, ideology apparel color requirements are ignored for this pawn kind.

specificApparelRequirements.label: Specific apparel requirements
specificApparelRequirements.description: Explicit apparel slot requirements that override tag-based and money-based selection for specific body layers.

techHediffsRequired.label: Tech hediffs required
techHediffsRequired.description: ThingDefs that must be installed as tech hediffs on this pawn kind regardless of techHediffsMoney.

techHediffsMoney.label: Tech hediffs money
techHediffsMoney.description: Silver value range used to select tech hediff implants for this pawn kind.

techHediffsTags.label: Tech hediffs tags
techHediffsTags.description: Tags controlling which implant categories are eligible for this pawn kind.

techHediffsDisallowTags.label: Tech hediffs disallow tags
techHediffsDisallowTags.description: Tags that prevent an implant from being selected for this pawn kind.

techHediffsChance.label: Tech hediffs chance
techHediffsChance.description: Probability (0–1) that tech hediff implants are generated for this pawn kind.

techHediffsMaxAmount.label: Tech hediffs max amount
techHediffsMaxAmount.description: Maximum number of tech hediff implants that can be installed during generation.

biocodeWeaponChance.label: Biocode weapon chance
biocodeWeaponChance.description: Probability (0–1) that the pawn's generated weapon is biocoded to them.

humanPregnancyChance.label: Human pregnancy chance
humanPregnancyChance.description: Probability (0–1) that a generated female pawn of this kind is pregnant.

startingHediffs.label: Starting hediffs
startingHediffs.description: Hediffs applied to pawns of this kind at spawn time, each with a configurable probability.

nakedChance.label: Naked chance
nakedChance.description: Probability (0–1) that a pawn of this kind is generated without any apparel.

existingDamage.label: Existing damage
existingDamage.description: Pre-existing wounds applied to the pawn at spawn, each with its own probability.

minApparelQuality.label: Min apparel quality
minApparelQuality.description: Minimum quality category for apparel generated for this pawn kind.

maxApparelQuality.label: Max apparel quality
maxApparelQuality.description: Maximum quality category for apparel generated for this pawn kind.

fixedInventory.label: Fixed inventory
fixedInventory.description: Items always placed in the pawn's inventory at spawn regardless of other inventory generation.

inventoryOptions.label: Inventory options
inventoryOptions.description: Probabilistic inventory generation tree. Supports take-all and choose-one sub-option branches.

invNutrition.label: Inventory nutrition
invNutrition.description: Amount of nutrition worth of food placed in the pawn's inventory at spawn.

invFoodDef.label: Inventory food def
invFoodDef.description: ThingDef used as the food item when invNutrition is set. Defaults to a generic meal when absent.

chemicalAddictionChance.label: Chemical addiction chance
chemicalAddictionChance.description: Probability (0–1) that a pawn of this kind is generated with a random chemical addiction.

combatEnhancingDrugsChance.label: Combat enhancing drugs chance
combatEnhancingDrugsChance.description: Probability (0–1) that combat-enhancing drugs are placed in the pawn's inventory.

combatEnhancingDrugsCount.label: Combat enhancing drugs count
combatEnhancingDrugsCount.description: Integer range for the number of combat-enhancing drug doses placed in the pawn's inventory.

forcedAddictions.label: Forced addictions
forcedAddictions.description: ChemicalDefs the pawn is always addicted to at generation.

trader.label: Trader
trader.description: If true, pawns of this kind carry trader inventories and can be interacted with as merchants.

skills.label: Skills
skills.description: Skill level ranges applied to specific skills during generation. Skills not listed use racial defaults.

requiredWorkTags.label: Required work tags
requiredWorkTags.description: Work tags that must be enabled on pawns of this kind. Each flag is a separate li element.

disabledWorkTags.label: Disabled work tags
disabledWorkTags.description: Work tags disabled for pawns of this kind. Each flag is a separate li element.

extraSkillLevels.label: Extra skill levels
extraSkillLevels.description: Additional skill levels added on top of the backstory and age-based skill totals during generation.

minTotalSkillLevels.label: Min total skill levels
minTotalSkillLevels.description: Minimum combined skill level across all skills that the generated pawn must have.

minBestSkillLevel.label: Min best skill level
minBestSkillLevel.description: Minimum level the pawn's highest skill must reach after generation.

labelMale.label: Label (male)
labelMale.description: Male-specific label override for this pawn kind.

labelMalePlural.label: Label (male plural)
labelMalePlural.description: Plural form of the male-specific label.

labelFemale.label: Label (female)
labelFemale.description: Female-specific label override for this pawn kind.

labelFemalePlural.label: Label (female plural)
labelFemalePlural.description: Plural form of the female-specific label.

wildGroupSize.label: Wild group size
wildGroupSize.description: Integer range for the number of pawns in a wild group when this kind spawns in the wild.

ecoSystemWeight.label: Ecosystem weight
ecoSystemWeight.description: Relative weight of this pawn kind in biome population calculations. Higher values increase its share of the wild population.

flyingAnimationFramePathPrefix.label: Flying animation frame path prefix
flyingAnimationFramePathPrefix.description: Texture path prefix for the flying animation frame sequence. Frames are numbered from this prefix.

flyingAnimationFramePathPrefixFemale.label: Flying animation frame path prefix (female)
flyingAnimationFramePathPrefixFemale.description: Texture path prefix for the female flying animation frame sequence.

flyingAnimationFrameCount.label: Flying animation frame count
flyingAnimationFrameCount.description: Number of frames in the flying animation sequence.

flyingAnimationTicksPerFrame.label: Flying animation ticks per frame
flyingAnimationTicksPerFrame.description: Number of game ticks each flying animation frame is displayed. -1 uses the life-stage animation timing.

flyingAnimationDrawSize.label: Flying animation draw size
flyingAnimationDrawSize.description: Scale of the flying animation graphic. Interpreted as an absolute size or a multiplier depending on flyingAnimationDrawSizeIsMultiplier.

flyingAnimationDrawSizeIsMultiplier.label: Flying animation draw size is multiplier
flyingAnimationDrawSizeIsMultiplier.description: If true, flyingAnimationDrawSize is multiplied with the life-stage body size rather than used as an absolute scale.

flyingAnimationInheritColors.label: Flying animation inherit colors
flyingAnimationInheritColors.description: If true, the flying animation graphic inherits the pawn's graphic colors instead of using its own.

human-pawn.label: Human pawn
human-pawn.description: A basic human pawn kind with race, weapon money, and apparel money.

animal-pawn.label: Animal pawn
animal-pawn.description: A basic animal pawn kind with race and ecosystem weight.
